description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add SpecLedEx.Realization.Canonical.hash_module_head_union/2 and hash_module_full_union/2 (both return {:ok, binary} | {:error, term}). Add private discover_module_exports/2 that uses Module.__info__/1 (runtime). Exclude module_info/0|1 from exports; include __struct__/0|1. Sort exports by {kind, name, arity}. Wrap in distinct envelopes ({:__module_head_union__, mod, sorted} vs {:__module_full_union__, mod, sorted}) before hashing. Source-AST fallback is NOT implemented (cold-load failures yield {:error, :not_loadable}).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: canonical_test.exs covers function-only module, function+macro module, struct module (__struct__ included), reorder-stability, envelope-tag distinction (head-union != full-union for same module), empty-public-export module deterministic, :not_loadable case, repeat-N byte-equality determinism probe.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.bare_module_api_boundary_hash, bare_module_implementation_hash, bare_module_runtime_only_discovery, bare_module_export_filtering.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (S4/S5)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/closure.ex (no closure walk from bare modules)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex
- test/specled_ex/realization/canonical_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT modify the existing Canonical.hash/1 entrypoint.
- Do NOT add source-AST fallback for bare-module discovery.
- Do NOT add private functions or behaviors that invite future closure-walking from bare modules.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

IMPLEMENTED
Session: eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991.jsonl

Commit: 4f19e21133fec92d9a93a6ef90cf14cdba97f784
Stage branch: specled_-701.4/canonical-module-union-hashing
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-701.4

Files touched:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (+202 / -0)
- test/specled_ex/realization/canonical_test.exs (+228 / -1)

Tests added (in SpecLedEx.Realization.CanonicalTest, describe "hash_module_head_union/2 and hash_module_full_union/2"):
- function-only module produces a deterministic head-union hash
- function-only module produces a deterministic full-union hash
- function+macro module: both kinds contribute to the hash
- struct module: __struct__/0 and __struct__/1 are included in the export set
- reorder-stability: source declaration order does not affect the hash
- envelope-tag distinction: head-union != full-union for the same module
- envelope-tag distinction holds even on a degenerate (empty-export) module
- empty-public-export module: hash is deterministic
- :not_loadable: cold-load failure surfaces as {:error, :not_loadable}
- repeat-N determinism probe: byte-equal hashes across repeated calls
- module_info/0 and module_info/1 are excluded from exports
- envelope shape: head entries are {kind, name, arity, head_ast}, sorted

Verification stubs flipped: none (.spec/** is Out of Scope for this ticket; the
realized_by spec verification block stays at execute: false until a later stage
where touching .spec is allowed).

Local sanity:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors --force: clean
- mix test: 670 tests, 0 failures (full suite)
- mix test test/specled_ex/realization/canonical_test.exs: 18 tests, 0 failures

Summary: Adds Canonical.hash_module_head_union/2 and hash_module_full_union/2.
Discovery is runtime-only via Module.__info__/1 (functions + macros), with
module_info/0|1 filtered out and __struct__/0|1 retained. Cold-load yields
{:error, :not_loadable}. Distinct envelope tags (:__module_head_union__ vs
:__module_full_union__) keep head/full hashes byte-distinct even on empty-
export modules. Per-export AST is pulled from BEAM debug_info and
Canonical.normalize/1-stabilized; head entries omit body, full entries
include args+guards+body. No source-AST fallback for bare modules per
specled.decision.realized_by_tier_implication. Existing Canonical.hash/1
entrypoint is unchanged. Diff touches only Allowed globs
(lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex, test/specled_ex/realization/canonical_test.exs).

title: S3: Canonical module-union hashing
